response.justification: Mohammed has excellent experience in building distributed systems and processing geospatial data, most notably through his work founding GISCollective. However, his recent technical stack is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, lacking the required recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, which are critical for this routing pipeline role.
strengths: Strong domain knowledge in geospatial data platforms and mapping through founding and developing GISCollective.
Proven experience building and optimizing high-throughput distributed systems and microservices.
Demonstrated systems programming capability using DLang for low-latency, asynchronous applications.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, the primary languages required for the role.
Most recent professional roles are heavily focused on web and full-stack technologies (Node.js, TypeScript) rather than backend data pipelines.
Geospatial experience appears more focused on mapping and point-of-interest collection rather than specific routing or navigation algorithms.
